hooks.command: cd ~ && git add .claude/history.jsonl .claude/projects/ .claude/settings.json .claude/memory/ .claude/.gitignore 2>/dev/null && git diff --cached --quiet 2>/dev/null || (git commit -m "auto: update conversation history $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')" && /c/Program\ Files/GitHub\ CLI/gh.exe push 2>&1)
